words.example: She was overjoyed when she heard the good news.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 좋은 소식을 듣고 매우 기뻐했다.

words.example: He was ecstatic about winning the prize.
The classroom was lively during the game.
She is enthusiastic about learning new languages.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 새로운 언어를 배우는 것에 열정적이다.

words.example: I was amazed by the beautiful view from the mountain.
words.exampleKo: 나는 산에서 본 아름다운 경치에 놀랐다.

words.example: We were shocked to hear about the accident.
words.exampleKo: 우리는 그 사고 소식을 듣고 충격을 받았다.

words.example: He looked bewildered by the difficult question.
My parents are concerned about my grades.
The room was tense before the exam results were announced.
words.exampleKo: 시험 결과가 발표되기 전 교실은 긴장되어 있었다.

words.example: She felt uneasy about speaking in front of the class.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 반 친구들 앞에서 말하는 것이 불안했다.

words.example: The movie had a frightening scene.
She was horrified by the scary story.
He was disgusted by the smell of the trash.
She felt depressed after losing the game.
He felt hopeless about finishing the project on time.
words.exampleKo: 그는 프로젝트를 제시간에 끝내는 것이 가망 없다고 느꼈다.

words.example: Don't get discouraged if you fail the first time.
She was heartbroken when her dog ran away.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 개가 도망갔을 때 가슴이 아팠다.

words.example: I was touched by his kind words.
It is impolite to talk while eating.
My teacher is very understanding about my mistakes.
words.exampleKo: 우리 선생님은 내 실수에 대해 매우 이해심이 많으시다.

words.example: She has a forgiving personality.
He is a hardworking student who studies every day.
She is ambitious and wants to become a doctor.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 야심이 있고 의사가 되고 싶어 한다.

words.example: The puppy is very playful with children.
words.exampleKo: 그 강아지는 아이들과 매우 장난기가 많다.

words.example: The roller coaster ride was thrilling.
The documentary about space was fascinating.
We had a pleasant afternoon at the park.
words.exampleKo: 우리는 공원에서 기분 좋은 오후를 보냈다.

words.example: The smell in the kitchen was unpleasant.
He is an agreeable person who rarely argues.
words.exampleKo: 그는 거의 다투지 않는 호감이 가는 사람이다.

words.example: He can be disagreeable when he is tired.
words.exampleKo: 그는 피곤할 때 무뚝뚝해질 수 있다.

words.example: She has a charming smile.
The new café has an attractive design.
words.exampleKo: 새 카페는 매력적인 디자인을 가지고 있다.

words.example: The idea sounded appealing to everyone.
The dessert on the menu looked tempting.
The smell of fresh bread was irresistible.
words.exampleKo: 갓 구운 빵 냄새는 거부할 수 없었다.

words.example: His constant complaining is annoying.
The noise from the construction site is irritating.
It is frustrating when the internet is slow.
The news report was disturbing.
The rise in temperature is alarming.
His health is a worrying issue for the family.
Her words were comforting after the loss.
words.exampleKo: 그녀의 말은 상실 후에 위로가 되었다.

words.example: The soft music had a soothing effect.
words.exampleKo: 부드러운 음악은 마음을 진정시키는 효과가 있었다.

words.example: A warm bath is relaxing after a long day.
words.exampleKo: 긴 하루 후 따뜻한 목욕은 편안하다.

words.example: A cold drink is refreshing on a hot day.
The long hike was exhausting.
Studying all night is tiring.
Her job as a doctor is very demanding.
The math test was challenging this time.
The directions to the museum were confusing.
I'm unsure about which club to join.
words.exampleKo: 나는 어느 동아리에 가입할지 확신이 서지 않는다.

words.example: The dog barked at the suspicious stranger.
The city was unfamiliar to the tourists.
The twins look very much alike.
Her speech was impressive to everyone.
He received an urgent message from his mother.
There was a sudden change in the weather.
This park is an ideal place for a picnic.
words.exampleKo: 이 공원은 소풍을 위한 이상적인 장소이다.

words.example: Nobody is perfect, we are all imperfect.
words.exampleKo: 완벽한 사람은 없고, 우리는 모두 불완전하다.

words.example: My classmate was very helpful during the project.
words.exampleKo: 내 학급 친구는 프로젝트 동안 매우 도움이 되었다.

words.example: The staff at the hotel were courteous to the guests.
words.exampleKo: 호텔 직원들은 손님들에게 예의 바르게 대했다.

words.example: She is a gifted painter.
I felt sluggish after eating too much lunch.
words.exampleKo: 나는 점심을 너무 많이 먹어서 나른했다.

words.example: He stayed focused during the test.
She gave a firm answer to the question.
He is resourceful and always finds a solution.
words.exampleKo: 그는 임기응변에 능해서 항상 해결책을 찾는다.

words.example: The students came up with an inventive idea.
She wrote an imaginative story for class.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 수업을 위해 상상력이 풍부한 이야기를 썼다.

words.example: His painting style is very original.
My grandfather has old-fashioned ideas about fashion.
words.exampleKo: 할아버지는 패션에 대해 구식인 생각을 가지고 계신다.

words.example: They formed a lasting friendship.
The meeting was too lengthy for everyone.
The medicine gave instant relief.
The rescue team took swift action.
We wish you a speedy recovery.
The library book is two days overdue.
words.exampleKo: 그 도서관 책은 이틀이나 기한이 지났다.

words.example: Our flight was delayed by an hour.
His mistake was not intentional.
The fire started from an accidental spark.
We had a meaningful conversation about our future.
words.exampleKo: 우리는 미래에 대해 의미 있는 대화를 나누었다.

words.example: Arguing over small things feels meaningless.
words.exampleKo: 작은 일로 다투는 것은 의미 없게 느껴진다.

words.example: There was a noticeable improvement in her grades.
words.exampleKo: 그녀의 성적에 눈에 띄는 향상이 있었다.

words.example: Give me an approximate time for the meeting.
His demand seemed unreasonable to us.
She was hesitant to raise her hand in class.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 수업 시간에 손을 드는 것을 망설였다.

words.example: A good leader must be decisive.
The weather this week has been changeable.
The movie had a lighthearted tone.
The market was full of vibrant colors.
Her old jeans are faded now.
The autumn air felt crisp this morning.
The road to the village was bumpy.
His voice was shaky during the presentation.
The old chair felt wobbly.
My shoelaces came loose during the race.
She feels insecure about her English speaking.
My older brother is very protective of me.
words.exampleKo: 우리 오빠는 나를 매우 보호하려 한다.

words.example: The hikers were exposed to strong wind on the peak.
He acted snobbish toward new students.
words.exampleKo: 그는 새로 온 학생들에게 거만하게 굴었다.

words.example: My neighbor is a bit nosy about my family.
words.exampleKo: 우리 이웃은 우리 가족에 대해 좀 참견하기 좋아한다.

words.example: She has a gossipy friend who tells everyone's secrets.
words.exampleKo: 그녀에게는 모두의 비밀을 말하는 소문내기 좋아하는 친구가 있다.

words.example: He seemed cold-hearted when he ignored her tears.
words.exampleKo: 그는 그녀의 눈물을 무시했을 때 매정해 보였다.

words.example: The new teacher is soft-spoken and gentle.
words.exampleKo: 새로 온 선생님은 말씨가 부드럽고 온화하다.

words.example: He is short-tempered when he is hungry.
words.exampleKo: 그는 배고플 때 화를 잘 낸다.

words.example: Everyone likes him because he is good-natured.
words.exampleKo: 그는 성격이 좋아서 모두가 그를 좋아한다.

words.example: She gave tactful advice to her friend.
He gave a frank opinion about the movie.
words.exampleKo: 그는 그 영화에 대해 솔직한 의견을 말했다.

words.example: The fox gave a sly smile before running off.
He took a sneaky look at the answer sheet.
She has an adventurous spirit and loves to travel.
My best friend has an easy-going personality.
words.exampleKo: 내 가장 친한 친구는 느긋한 성격을 가지고 있다.

words.example: The warmhearted old man helped the lost child.
words.exampleKo: 마음이 따뜻한 노인이 길 잃은 아이를 도와주었다.

words.example: He gets irritable when he doesn't sleep enough.
words.exampleKo: 그는 잠을 충분히 못 자면 짜증을 잘 낸다.

words.example: She stayed level-headed during the emergency.
The famous singer is surprisingly down-to-earth.
words.exampleKo: 그 유명한 가수는 놀랄 만큼 소탈하다.

words.example: Making that decision was short-sighted.
Being narrow-minded can limit your friendships.
She felt self-conscious about her new haircut.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 새 머리 스타일에 대해 남을 의식했다.

words.example: My cousin is free-spirited and loves adventure.
He is absentminded and often forgets his keys.
words.exampleKo: 그는 건망증이 있어서 자주 열쇠를 잊어버린다.

words.example: Summer vacation gives students a carefree feeling.
words.exampleKo: 여름 방학은 학생들에게 근심 없는 기분을 준다.

words.example: His face looked grim after hearing the news.
words.exampleKo: 그 소식을 듣고 그의 얼굴은 침울해 보였다.

words.example: She gave a quick-witted answer to the tricky question.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 까다로운 질문에 재치 있게 대답했다.

words.example: The bad-tempered dog barked at everyone.
words.exampleKo: 그 성질 나쁜 개는 모두에게 짖었다.

words.example: Helping others is a noble act.
words.exampleKo: 다른 사람을 돕는 것은 고귀한 행동이다.

words.example: It was unkind of him to laugh at her mistake.
words.exampleKo: 그가 그녀의 실수를 비웃은 것은 불친절했다.

words.example: It seemed heartless to ignore the crying child.
words.exampleKo: 우는 아이를 무시하는 것은 무정해 보였다.

words.example: It is dishonest to copy someone's homework.
words.exampleKo: 다른 사람의 숙제를 베끼는 것은 정직하지 못하다.

words.example: His handwriting is quite sloppy.
My little brother is fussy about food.
She is picky about what clothes she wears.
He seemed indifferent to the result of the game.
They became distant after the argument.
My sister is extroverted and loves meeting new people.
words.exampleKo: 내 여동생은 외향적이어서 새로운 사람을 만나는 것을 좋아한다.

words.example: Talking about your feelings can help you feel better.
words.exampleKo: 네 감정에 대해 이야기하는 것은 기분을 나아지게 할 수 있다.

words.example: Kindness is one of his best traits.
words.exampleKo: 친절함은 그의 가장 좋은 특성 중 하나이다.

words.example: The baby has a calm temperament.
words.exampleKo: 그 아기는 차분한 기질을 가지고 있다.

words.example: The trip helped increase closeness between the friends.
words.exampleKo: 그 여행은 친구들 사이의 친밀함을 늘리는 데 도움이 되었다.

words.example: His lie caused distrust among his friends.
words.exampleKo: 그의 거짓말은 친구들 사이에 불신을 일으켰다.

words.example: The teacher had a suspicion that someone had cheated.
words.exampleKo: 선생님은 누군가 부정행위를 했다는 의심을 가졌다.

words.example: The story is about cruelty and kindness.
words.exampleKo: 그 이야기는 잔인함과 친절함에 관한 것이다.

words.example: I felt the warmth of her kindness.
His coldness surprised his old friends.
words.exampleKo: 그의 냉정함은 오랜 친구들을 놀라게 했다.

words.example: Her friendliness made everyone feel welcome.
words.exampleKo: 그녀의 다정함은 모두를 환영받는 느낌이 들게 했다.

words.example: There was hostility between the two teams.
The old man valued the companionship of his dog.
words.exampleKo: 그 노인은 자신의 개와의 동료애를 소중히 여겼다.

words.example: She asked for forgiveness after the fight.
His words of encouragement gave me confidence.
words.exampleKo: 그의 격려의 말은 나에게 자신감을 주었다.

words.example: He is just an acquaintance, not a close friend.
words.exampleKo: 그는 그냥 아는 사람이지, 친한 친구는 아니다.

words.example: We visited our relatives during the holiday.
Her stepfather is very kind to her.
Their parents went through a divorce last year.
They celebrated ten years of marriage.
They announced their engagement at the party.
We were invited to my cousin's wedding.
The couple walked together in the park.
The breakup made her very sad.
words.exampleKo: 그 이별은 그녀를 매우 슬프게 했다.

words.example: His betrayal hurt his best friend deeply.
words.exampleKo: 그의 배신은 가장 친한 친구에게 깊은 상처를 주었다.

words.example: There is a friendly rivalry between the two schools.
words.exampleKo: 두 학교 사이에는 우호적인 경쟁 관계가 있다.

words.example: The project succeeded because of good cooperation.
words.exampleKo: 그 프로젝트는 좋은 협력 덕분에 성공했다.

words.example: She adores her little sister.
He confided his worries to his best friend.
words.exampleKo: 그는 가장 친한 친구에게 걱정을 털어놓았다.

words.example: She pretended to be happy at the party.
Her speech impressed the whole audience.
words.exampleKo: 그녀의 연설은 모든 청중에게 깊은 인상을 주었다.

words.example: His joke embarrassed his sister in front of her friends.
words.exampleKo: 그의 농담은 친구들 앞에서 여동생을 창피하게 만들었다.

words.example: The loud thunder frightened the little boy.
words.exampleKo: 큰 천둥소리가 어린 소년을 겁먹게 했다.

words.example: Don't scare your little brother like that.
words.exampleKo: 네 남동생을 그렇게 놀라게 하지 마.

words.example: The sudden noise startled everyone in the room.
words.exampleKo: 갑작스러운 소음이 방에 있던 모든 사람을 깜짝 놀라게 했다.

words.example: The clown amused the children at the party.
words.exampleKo: 그 광대는 파티에서 아이들을 즐겁게 해 주었다.

words.example: The delicious meal satisfied everyone at the table.
words.exampleKo: 그 맛있는 식사는 식탁에 있는 모두를 만족시켰다.

words.example: The news about the trip excited the students.
The concert thrilled the whole crowd.
words.exampleKo: 그 콘서트는 모든 관중을 짜릿하게 했다.

words.example: The surprise party delighted her.
words.exampleKo: 그 깜짝 파티는 그녀를 기쁘게 했다.

words.example: She always defends her friends when they are teased.
words.exampleKo: 그녀는 친구들이 놀림당할 때 항상 그들을 옹호한다.

words.example: Please inform me if there are any changes.
words.exampleKo: 변경 사항이 있으면 저에게 알려 주세요.

words.example: The school will notify parents about the schedule change.
words.exampleKo: 학교는 일정 변경에 대해 학부모에게 통지할 것이다.

words.example: He strives to do his best in every subject.
words.exampleKo: 그는 모든 과목에서 최선을 다하려고 노력한다.

words.example: Don't underestimate how hard the test will be.
He overestimated his ability to finish the race.
words.exampleKo: 그는 경주를 끝낼 수 있는 자신의 능력을 과대평가했다.

words.example: She reacted calmly to the surprising news.
